SHARDS sampling strategy.question: Rate-floor handling for 0.01% on 1M trace (below 200-sample PITFALLS M4 gate)
SHARDS sampling strategy.answer: Keep 0.01% with flagged caveat (n_samples column; writeup/figure flag 'below paper-recommended 200-sample floor')

SHARDS sampling strategy.question: Self-convergence MAE metric shape
SHARDS sampling strategy.answer: 10% as reference; three rows MAE(r vs 10%) for r in {0.01%, 0.1%, 1%}

SHARDS sampling strategy.question: Parallel 50K exact-oracle regime (PITFALLS M4 two-regime mitigation)
SHARDS sampling strategy.answer: Yes — run SHARDS + --shards-exact on 50K sub-slice; report 'oracle MAE at 50K' alongside 'self-convergence MAE at 1M'
